cost_summary.notes: free_only mode shows $0 by request; hybrid includes Brave request fees + GPT search request fees + configured GPT token rates.

fundamental_news.headline: CrowdStrike Named a Frost Radar™ Leader in Cloud Native Application Protection Platforms for the Fourth Consecutive Time
fundamental_news.summary: CrowdStrike has been recognized as an Innovation and Growth Leader in the 2026 Frost Radar™ for Cloud-Native Application Protection Platforms, highlighting its ability to unify posture, runtime protection, and cloud detection and response into a single platform that secures cloud workloads and AI infrastructure at the point of execution.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This recognition underscores CrowdStrike's strong position in the cloud security market, reinforcing its competitive moat and potential for sustained growth as enterprises increasingly adopt cloud-native and AI-driven infrastructures.

fundamental_news.headline: CrowdStrike Launches Project QuiltWorks, Uniting the Cybersecurity Industry as Frontier AI Models Accelerate Risk
fundamental_news.summary: CrowdStrike has launched Project QuiltWorks, an industry-wide coalition aimed at addressing vulnerabilities in production code discovered by frontier AI models. The initiative includes partners like Accenture, EY, IBM Cybersecurity Services, Kroll, and OpenAI to help organizations assess and remediate AI-induced vulnerabilities.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: By leading this coalition, CrowdStrike demonstrates its commitment to addressing emerging cybersecurity challenges posed by AI, enhancing its reputation as a proactive and innovative leader in the cybersecurity industry.

fundamental_news.headline: CrowdStrike Expands Strategic Collaboration With Intel to Secure the Next Generation of AI PCs
fundamental_news.summary: CrowdStrike has expanded its collaboration with Intel to optimize the Falcon platform for Intel-powered AI PCs, enabling organizations to detect threats faster and safeguard sensitive data as AI workloads move directly onto the endpoint.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This partnership with Intel enhances CrowdStrike's capabilities in securing AI-driven endpoints, addressing the growing need for robust security solutions in AI-powered devices.

fundamental_news.headline: CrowdStrike Unveils Falcon Next-Gen SIEM Support for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, Advancing Open Security Architecture
fundamental_news.summary: CrowdStrike has introduced Falcon Next-Gen SIEM, which now ingests and correlates Microsoft Defender for Endpoint telemetry without requiring additional sensors. This innovation accelerates the transformation of legacy SIEM systems across diverse environments.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This development enhances CrowdStrike's platform interoperability and positions it as a key player in modernizing security operations, aligning with the industry's shift towards open security architectures.

fundamental_news.headline: CrowdStrike Establishes the Endpoint as the Epicenter for AI Security
fundamental_news.summary: CrowdStrike has introduced new capabilities across its Falcon platform, establishing the endpoint as the central point for AI security. These innovations extend AI agent discovery, governance, and runtime protection across endpoints, SaaS, browser, and cloud environments.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: By centralizing AI security at the endpoint, CrowdStrike strengthens its position in securing AI workloads, a critical area as AI adoption accelerates across industries.

fundamental_news.headline: Reddit to Announce First Quarter Results on Thursday, April 30, 2026
fundamental_news.summary: Reddit scheduled the release of its Q1 2026 financial results for April 30, 2026, with a conference call to discuss the results at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET the same day. The live webcast and related earnings materials were accessible on Reddit’s Investor Relations website.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The scheduled earnings release indicates transparency and timely communication with investors, which is crucial for maintaining investor confidence and supports a positive long-term investment thesis.

fundamental_news.headline: Intuitive Machines Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call
fundamental_news.summary: Intuitive Machines has scheduled its Q1 2026 earnings release for May 14, 2026, with a conference call on the same day at 8:30 am ET.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The upcoming earnings report will provide insights into the company's financial health and progress toward its revenue goals, which is crucial for assessing the long-term investment thesis.

fundamental_news.headline: Intuitive Machines Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
fundamental_news.summary: The company reported Q4 2025 revenue of $44.8 million and a net loss of $19.9 million, with a positive outlook for 2026 revenue between $900 million and $1 billion.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The financial results and revenue guidance provide insight into the company's growth trajectory and financial health, which are key considerations for long-term investors.

fundamental_news.headline: Intuitive Machines Completes Transformative Lanteris Space Systems Acquisition
fundamental_news.summary: Intuitive Machines completed its $800 million acquisition of Lanteris Space Systems, enhancing its capabilities as a vertically integrated space prime contractor.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The acquisition strengthens Intuitive Machines' position in the space industry, aligning with its strategy to become a leading space prime contractor, which supports the long-term investment thesis.

fundamental_news.headline: Pony AI (PONY) Earnings Date and Reports 2026
fundamental_news.summary: Pony AI is scheduled to report its Q1 2026 earnings on May 19, 2026, with analysts estimating an EPS of -$0.12 and revenue of $22.30 million.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Upcoming earnings reports provide insights into Pony AI's financial health and progress toward profitability, which are crucial for assessing the viability of its long-term investment thesis.

fundamental_news.headline: Pony AI Launches PonyWorld 2.0, a Self-Improving Physical AI Engine for Autonomous Driving
fundamental_news.summary: Pony AI introduced PonyWorld 2.0, an upgraded AI engine designed to autonomously identify and address its own weaknesses, aiming to accelerate the commercialization of Level 4 autonomous driving technology.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The development of PonyWorld 2.0 enhances Pony AI's technological capabilities, potentially strengthening its competitive position in the autonomous driving market and supporting its long-term growth objectives.

fundamental_news.headline: Pony AI rises nearly 3% on earnings beat, robotaxi revenue surge, UBER Partnership
fundamental_news.summary: Pony AI reported Q4 2025 earnings that exceeded analyst expectations, with adjusted EPS of $0.12 and revenue of $29.1 million, alongside a strategic partnership with Uber to launch the first commercial robotaxi service in Europe.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The earnings beat and strategic partnership with Uber indicate strong financial performance and potential for market expansion, reinforcing the company's long-term growth prospects.

fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Completes Second Dedicated Launch for Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency (JAXA)
fundamental_news.summary: On April 23, 2026, Rocket Lab successfully launched a mission for JAXA, marking its second dedicated launch for the agency, demonstrating its growing presence in the Asian market.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This achievement underscores Rocket Lab's expanding international partnerships and its ability to cater to diverse customer needs, enhancing its competitive position in the global launch services market.

fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Secures $190M Contract for 20x HASTE Launches, Cements Hypersonics Leadership with Department of War Partnership
fundamental_news.summary: On March 18, 2026, Rocket Lab announced a $190 million contract for 20 hypersonic test flights with its HASTE launch vehicle, solidifying its leadership in hypersonic technology.

fundamental_news.headline: IREN Announces Successful Energization of Sweetwater 1
fundamental_news.summary: On May 1, 2026, IREN Limited announced the successful energization of its 1.4GW Sweetwater 1 data center site in Texas, marking a key milestone in the development of the broader 2GW Sweetwater campus. This energization is expected to progressively deliver power in line with the phased construction and commissioning of data centers at the site, enhancing IREN's capacity to meet the growing demand for AI infrastructure. ([marketscreener.com](https://www.marketscreener.com/news/iren-announces-successful-energization-of-sweetwater-1-ce7f58d9de8dff26?utm_source=openai))
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The successful energization of Sweetwater 1 demonstrates IREN's ability to execute large-scale data center projects, bolstering its competitive position in the AI cloud services market and supporting its long-term growth strategy.

fundamental_news.headline: IREN Appoints John Gross as Chief Innovation Officer
fundamental_news.summary: On February 17, 2026, IREN Limited announced the appointment of John Gross as Chief Innovation Officer, a newly established role responsible for leading engineering standards, thermal architecture, and commissioning across IREN’s next-generation data centers. Mr. Gross is a globally recognized leader in data center engineering, with two decades of industry experience and deep expertise in high-density and liquid-cooled data center design. ([globenewswire.com](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/02/17/3238996/0/en/iren-appoints-john-gross-as-chief-innovation-officer.html?utm_source=openai))
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The appointment of John Gross as Chief Innovation Officer underscores IREN's commitment to advancing its data center capabilities, particularly in high-density and liquid-cooled designs, which are critical for supporting AI workloads and enhancing its competitive moat in the AI cloud services market.
